prompts.name: Natural Skin Detail
prompts.text: Preserve natural skin detail with soft texture, subtle imperfections, believable shading, and balanced smoothness.

prompts.name: Hair Strand Detail
prompts.text: Emphasize individual hair strands, soft flyaways, natural shine, and believable hair flow.

prompts.name: Eye Reflections
prompts.text: Enhance the eyes with clean reflections, detailed irises, bright catchlights, and expressive clarity.

prompts.name: Fabric Folds
prompts.text: Enhance clothing with natural fabric folds, seam detail, thickness, and material-specific behavior.

prompts.name: Jewelry Detail
prompts.text: Enhance jewelry with small highlights, metal reflections, gemstone clarity, and refined craftsmanship.

prompts.name: Environmental Detail
prompts.text: Add meaningful environmental detail while keeping the composition readable and focused.

prompts.name: Micro Texture
prompts.text: Add subtle micro textures to materials, skin, clothing, and surfaces for a more grounded image.

prompts.name: Reflections
prompts.text: Add believable reflections on glass, metal, water, or polished surfaces according to the lighting.

prompts.name: Atmospheric Depth
prompts.text: Add depth through foreground, midground, background separation, haze, and controlled contrast.

prompts.name: Motion Flow
prompts.text: Add natural motion cues through hair, clothing, pose, or environmental movement.

prompts.name: Clean Edges
prompts.text: Keep important shapes clean and readable with clear silhouettes and controlled detail.

prompts.name: Subtle Wear
prompts.text: Add subtle wear, scuffs, fabric variation, or material aging where appropriate for realism.

prompts.name: Background Balance
prompts.text: Keep the background detailed enough to feel alive but not so busy that it competes with the subject.

prompts.name: Light Interaction
prompts.text: Ensure light interacts realistically with skin, hair, clothing, props, and the environment.

prompts.name: Final Clarity
prompts.text: Improve overall clarity, subject readability, material detail, and coherent image finish.
